data.biography: In just a few years into her professional career, Krys Marshall has wasted no time establishing herself as a promising young actress by gaining respect and accolades for her hard work on stage and screen. After Classically training at The University of North Carolina School of the Arts, she began working in and around New York City, doing improv comedy and Regional Theater. She resides in Los Angeles, where she works primarily in Television & Commercials.
data.name: Krys Marshall
